title: Research Project on Transfer Learning and Vehicle Recognition
desc: This project was a study with a comparative approach aimed to determine the robustness of training deep neural networks on a noisy dataset using the transfer learning technique. The proposed approach was applied in a vehicle recognition scenario and resulted in a journal publication of 'Transfer Learning Approach for Classification and Noise Reduction on Noisy Web Data'.

title: Early research on Deep Depth Colorization
desc: I was one of the contributors to the early research on Deep Depth Colorization where we proposed a novel approach of normalizing and mapping the depth data into a higher dimension to improve the recognition accuracy of RGB-D images using ConvNets (from Nov. 2016 till Mar. 2017). I also assisted in the preparation phase of a synthetic depth dataset called VANDAL which is used to train Deep Neural Networks (from Feb. 2016 till Apr. 2016).

title: Different Companies
desc: I developed a RESTful application for Avasamaneh company, and an Android application for management purposes.

title: Bachelor Training Course
location: ATSYS Electrical/Electronic Manufacturing Company, Tehran, Iran
desc: I developed several modules using Java programming language for the Company’s Content Management System. Furthermore, I assisted in configuring the network’s infrastructure. It was a part of my training course which I passed during my bachelor’s degree.

title: Different Companies
desc: I developed an application for statistical purposes for Pangan Avaran company which was written in C#. In addition, I developed a CMS Android application for a website called Armandownload.
